name: Meridian Consulting
description: Premium consulting firm delivering transformative strategy, operations, and digital solutions for forward-thinking enterprises.
address: One World Trade Center, Suite 8500, New York, NY 10007

hero.heading: Transform your business with strategic clarity
hero.subheading: We partner with ambitious organizations to solve complex challenges, unlock growth, and build lasting competitive advantage through data-driven strategy and execution.

services.name: Strategy
services.desc: Define winning strategies with market analysis, competitive positioning, and roadmaps that drive measurable growth.

services.name: Operations
services.desc: Optimize processes, reduce costs, and build resilient supply chains that scale with your ambitions.

services.name: Digital Transformation
services.desc: Modernize your technology stack, automate workflows, and create seamless digital experiences.

services.name: Financial Advisory
services.desc: Navigate M&A, restructuring, and capital strategy with rigorous financial modeling and due diligence.

services.name: Growth
services.desc: Accelerate revenue through market expansion, pricing optimization, and go-to-market excellence.

services.name: Change Management
services.desc: Lead organizational transformation with stakeholder alignment, culture design, and adoption programs.

about.heading: Trusted advisors for transformative outcomes
about.body: For over two decades, Meridian has been the strategic partner of choice for enterprises navigating complexity. Our consultants combine deep industry expertise with rigorous analytical frameworks to deliver solutions that are both visionary and actionable. We don't just advise — we embed alongside your teams to ensure execution excellence.

values.title: Results-Driven
values.desc: Every engagement is measured by tangible business impact.

values.title: Trusted Partners
values.desc: Confidential, ethical, and deeply committed to your success.

values.title: Global Reach
values.desc: Offices in 12 countries with expertise across every major market.

testimonials.quote: Meridian helped us navigate a complex merger that doubled our market share. Their strategic clarity and hands-on approach made all the difference during a critical transformation.
testimonials.name: Robert Kellner

testimonials.quote: The digital transformation roadmap they built saved us $18M annually and positioned us as the technology leader in our sector. Exceptional execution from day one.
testimonials.name: Sarah Mitchell

testimonials.quote: Working with Meridian was a turning point. Their operations team identified inefficiencies we'd overlooked for years and delivered results within the first quarter.
testimonials.name: Marcus Thompson

pricing.name: Advisory
pricing.desc: Strategic guidance for growing businesses ready to scale.

pricing.name: Partnership
pricing.desc: Full-service consulting with embedded team support.

cta.heading: Ready to transform your organization?
cta.subheading: Schedule a confidential consultation with our senior partners. No obligation, no pressure — just strategic clarity.

contact.heading: Let's start a conversation
contact.subheading: Tell us about your challenge. Our team will respond within 24 hours with a tailored approach.
